fixes.rationale: Only reset the tracker once when failover is disabled or the window is invalid, avoiding repeated atomic stores on every hot-path URMA sample after the window is already clear.

skipped.reason: The correct remediation is deleting the checked-in .conversations JSONL artifact, which is a whole-file removal rather than a safe single-line or small contiguous replacement suggestion.
Hiding the test-only accessor safely requires coordinated header, source, and test changes; a single anchored small edit would risk producing an uncompilable partial fix.
